corrections.claim5_cap_never_binds: Overstated two ways. (a) unit's q_max_raw tracked the LO bucket only: deployed hi-bucket raw reached .5357 (not .5224); spec .541 (lo) unchanged; all still < .56 and cap-grid deltas remain $0.00, so the action stands. (b) 'never binds for any conforming calibrator' is false for the pooled-shrink families: e_shrink100/200 raw reached .5768/.5727 and were cap-bound 5-6/63 nights at .56 (unit's own calib_results shows this); correct scope is deployed/spec/hybrid/fixed-neutral-seed families
corrections.claim6_only_variant: 'only conforming variant robust in both fill-model worlds' is false by the unit's own part4 numbers: cost_M200_seedled (cost bucket, M200, ledger seeds .5057/.5068) also beats deployed in BOTH worlds and beats the hybrid on the bed in both (base $1629 vs $1484; stress $862 vs $809). Hybrid's edge over seedled is spec conformance (registered mean-.5 prior), not bed performance; the unit's own action text already allows seedled as a documented alternative, so the recommendation stands but the uniqueness sentence must be dropped
corrections.claim3_units: '12 additional rich first-poll records running -$2.22/share' — the -$2.22 is the SUM of per-share nets over the 12 flipped settled records (mean -18.5c/sh each), not a per-share rate; costs .5075-.5275 = R2 zone confirmed
corrections.minor: TEST period is 17.15d not 17.5d; Brier spread across all 16 families is .0011 (.24658-.24768), the quoted .0009 holds only excluding the d_win10/d_decay7 variants; measured/day 14.6 (all records) vs 14.24 (settled) both correct in context
